source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 今年国家级气象站出现首个50℃
topics.official_english: First 50°C Recorded at National Weather Station This Year
topics.why_hot: Extreme heat event sparks public concern over climate change and heatwave impacts.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind extreme temperatures and what it means for daily life and policy.

topics.chinese_topic: 全国就业公共服务地图来了
topics.official_english: National Employment Public Service Map Launched
topics.why_hot: New government service aims to help job seekers find opportunities, reflecting employment concerns.
topics.share_angle: Show how the map works and its potential impact on job hunting in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 国务院批复 超7万亿元大产业来了
topics.official_english: State Council Approves Mega Industry Worth Over 7 Trillion Yuan
topics.why_hot: Major economic policy move signals government focus on strategic industries.
topics.share_angle: Break down which industry is involved and what it means for China's economy.

topics.chinese_topic: 哈工大学生研制紫丁香三号成功发射
topics.why_hot: Student-led satellite project showcases China's youth innovation in aerospace.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the achievement and how it inspires STEM education.

topics.chinese_topic: 同款鞋耐克官方店比经销商贵400元
topics.official_english: Same Nike Shoes: Official Store 400 Yuan More Expensive Than Dealers
topics.why_hot: Price disparity sparks consumer discussion on brand pricing strategies.
topics.share_angle: Analyze why official stores charge more and what it reveals about retail dynamics.

topics.official_english: Tour Guide Industry 'Dead'? Industry Voices Concern
topics.why_hot: Post-pandemic tourism recovery challenges and changing travel habits hit tour guides hard.
topics.share_angle: Explore the reasons behind the claim and the future of travel services.

topics.chinese_topic: 免打孔单杠已成家庭隐形杀手
topics.official_english: No-Drill Pull-Up Bars Become Hidden Home Hazards
topics.why_hot: Safety warnings about popular home fitness equipment go viral.
topics.share_angle: Explain the risks and how to use such equipment safely.

topics.chinese_topic: 教师反映陪餐制度占用午休时间
topics.official_english: Teachers Complain Meal Supervision Policy Cuts Into Lunch Breaks
topics.why_hot: Education policy implementation sparks debate on teacher workload.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the balance between student safety and teacher well-being.
